[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11001000 3
1 11001101 5
2 11111000 5
3 10000110 3
4 11011001 5
5 11111111 a
6 11111111 a
7 11111111 a

01 10 00110000 2
12 21 10011001 4
23 32 00101000 2
34 43 01011010 4
45 54 00010011 3
56 65 01111110 6
67 76 01011111 6
70 07 11101001 5

13 31 10110001 4
24 42 01110010 4
35 53 01001001 3
46 64 01101101 5
57 75 00100001 2
60 06 10110110 5
71 17 11011001 5 match 4

14 41 11101011 6

36 63 00110111 5
47 74 00110010 3
50 05 11001000 3 match 0
61 16 10000110 3 match 3
72 27 01000000 1

26 62 00011111 5
37 73 01101000 3
